# FgoGotran terminology snapshot

- Upstream: https://github.com/walterp56/FgoGotran
- Manifest: https://cdn.fgogotran.com/db/zh-Hans/latest/manifest.json
- Content version: `2026.07.12.1`
- Database SHA-256: `5de699a68ff1f1b9c46f6d9e7d9d4eb7c5648f362f86032c82525b9c67780104`
- Database size: `102400` bytes
- Converted contents: 837 character names and 137 terminology rows

`glossary.mjs` is a fixed, deterministic conversion of the pinned SQLite
database. The application does not contact FgoGotran at runtime.
